title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Jio Platforms
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Software Engineer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
